info.name: Soracom Batch API
info.description: Create and run batch jobs that apply API calls across multiple SIMs or devices.

query.description: Maximum number of tasks to retrieve. The number of tasks returned may be less than the specified value.
The value of the `x-soracom-next-key` header returned in the response to the last request. Specify this to retrieve the next page of tasks.

request.description: Returns a list of tasks in the specified batch job. Each task represents an individual API operation executed as part of the batch job.

response.name: A list of batch tasks was retrieved successfully.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Maximum number of batch jobs to retrieve. The number of batch jobs returned may be less than the specified value.
The value of the `x-soracom-next-key` header returned in the response to the last request. Specify this to retrieve the next page of batch jobs.

request.description:
Create a new batch job and run it. A batch job consists of multiple tasks, each representing an API operation to be performed. Tasks are executed using the permissions of the user that created the batch job API. Batch job information is retained for 32 days.

**System Limits:**

- Each batch job is limited to a single API action. Mixing different APIs in the same job is not supported.
- Each batch job is limited to a maximum of 10,000 tasks.
- Only one batch job per API action can be created and processed at a time.
- Batch jobs may be delayed or restricted if system load is high. If this occurs, please wait and try again later.

response.name: The batch job has been created and execution has started.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name:
Bad request. This error can occur in the following cases:
- Attempting to mix different APIs in a single batch job
- Already running a batch job with the same API for this operator

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: Batch job execution is restricted due to high system load.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: Delete the specified batch group. Batch groups can only be deleted if there are no running batch jobs in the group.

response.name: The batch group has been deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: The batch group cannot be deleted because there are running batch jobs.

request.description: Create a new batch group for organizing and managing batch jobs. To create a batch job, use the [Batch:createBatchJob](#/Batch/createBatchJob) instead.
